---
title: "Instructor"
author: "Davi Moreira"
editor: visual
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .overflow-table { font-size: 0.85rem; width: 100%; line-height: 1.25; }
  .overflow-table th, .overflow-table td {
    padding: 0.35rem; text-align: left; word-wrap: break-word; vertical-align: top;
  }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(1), .overflow-table td:nth-child(1) { width: 34%; }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(2), .overflow-table td:nth-child(2) { width: 12%; }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(3), .overflow-table td:nth-child(3) { width: 18%; }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(4), .overflow-table td:nth-child(4) { width: 16%; }
  .below-table { font-size: 0.85rem; line-height: 1.3; margin-top: 1rem; }
</style>
```

# Instructor Material

Instructor notebooks (with solutions) and session guides, one row per topic.
Both live in the **private** repository
[`davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor`](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor){target="_blank"} —
opening them requires being signed in to GitHub as the instructor. One-time
Colab setup: open [colab.research.google.com](https://colab.research.google.com/github){target="_blank"},
choose the GitHub tab, and check **"Include private repos"** when authorizing.

::: overflow-table

| Topic | Sessions | Notebook (solutions) | Session guide | Readings |
|-------|----------|----------------------|---------------|----------|
| **Phase 1 — Curiosity, gaps, answerable questions** | | | | |
| **Topic 00 · Launchpad: How do we know? Colab + Ask → Verify → Document** | 1 lecture | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb00_launchpad_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/00_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | RDSS ch. 1, 2 |
| **Topic 01 · Curiosity → gap → problem → answerable question** | 2 lectures | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb01_curiosity_to_question_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/01_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | RDSS ch. 2, 3, 4 |
| **Phase 2 — Compass, sources, model & measurement** | | | | |
| **Topic 02 · The inquiry compass: classify the question by kind + reach** | 1 lecture | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb02_four_approaches_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/02_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | RDSS ch. 7<br>*+ optional CB case* |
| **Topic 03 · Real sources, citation integrity, and the claim map** | 1 lecture | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb03_sources_claims_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/03_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | RDSS ch. 4 |
| **Topic 04 · Model & Inquiry (MIDA I): worlds, potential outcomes, DAGs** | 1 lecture | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb04_model_inquiry_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/04_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | RDSS ch. 6, 7 |
| **Topic 05 · Measurement & operationalization: concept → construct → indicator** | 1 lecture | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb05_measurement_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/05_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | RDSS ch. 8 |
| **Phase 3 — Data & answer strategies** | | | | |
| **Topic 06 · Description deep dive: honest summaries & visualization** | 1 lecture | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb06_description_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/06_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | RDSS ch. 15<br>*+ optional CB case* |
| **Topic 07 · Data strategy (MIDA II): sampling, assignment, ethics** | 2 lectures | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb07_data_strategy_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/07_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | RDSS ch. 8 |
| **Topic 08 · Async module: diagnose a misleading claim (milestone work day)** | async module | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb08_async_claim_diagnosis_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/08_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | RDSS ch. 9<br>*+ optional CB case* |
| **Topic 09 · Answer strategy (MIDA III): estimators & regression** | 2 lectures | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb09_answer_strategy_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/09_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | RDSS ch. 9 |
| **Topic 10 · Generalization deep dive: uncertainty, reach, power** | 2 lectures | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb10_inference_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/10_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | RDSS ch. 9, 15, 10<br>*+ optional CB case* |
| **Phase 4 — Pilot, diagnosis, redesign** | | | | |
| **Topic 11 · Declare → Diagnose → Redesign: the design engine** | 2 lectures | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb11_declare_diagnose_redesign_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/11_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | RDSS ch. 10, 13, 11 |
| **Topic 12 · Prediction deep dive: target, baseline, split, metric, leakage** | 1 lecture | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb12_prediction_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/12_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | RDSS ch. 15, 9, 10<br>*+ optional CB case* |
| **Topic 13 · Causal reasoning deep dive: counterfactuals & identification** | 1 lecture | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb13_causal_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/13_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | RDSS ch. 18, 16 |
| **Phase 5 — Poster construction & submission** | | | | |
| **Topic 14 · Poster: storyboard, red-team, final production** | 2 lectures | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb14_poster_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/14_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | — |
| **Phase 6 — Conference preparation** | | | | |
| **Topic 15 · Communicating evidence: pitches, uncertainty, rehearsal** | 3 lectures | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb15_communicating_evidence_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/15_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | RDSS ch. 10 |
| **Phase 7 — Reflection, feedback, redesign** | | | | |
| **Topic 16 · Conference debrief → feedback-to-redesign** | 1 lecture | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb16_debrief_redesign_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/16_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | RDSS ch. 11 |
| **Topic 17 · Async module: poster-to-dossier — sensitivity & claim ledger** | async module | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb17_async_poster_to_dossier_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/17_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | RDSS ch. 22 |
| **Phase 8 — Reproducibility, brief, Evidence Defense** | | | | |
| **Topic 18 · Reproducibility audit + research brief** | 2 lectures | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb18_reproducibility_brief_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/18_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | RDSS ch. 21, 22, 23 |
| **Topic 19 · Evidence Defense + synthesis** | 2 lectures | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/notebooks/instructor/nb19_evidence_defense_instructor.ipynb){target="_blank"} | [session guide](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_evidence_driven_research_purdue_HONR464_instructor/blob/main/session_guides/19_session_guide.md){target="_blank"} | RDSS ch. 24 |

:::
::: below-table

Instructor material is synced by `scripts/sync_instructor_repo.sh` after each
notebook build. This page is encrypted at render time
(`scripts/protect_instructor_page.py`); the password gate is a courtesy lock —
the private repository plus GitHub authentication is the real protection.

:::
